description_long: This modern bungalow features a single-story, L-shaped layout with a flat, dark roof and a mix of wood and concrete exterior finishes. The front yard is landscaped with a large central tree, several shrubs, and a geometric stone pathway leading to the main entrance. A private backyard area includes a rectangular swimming pool surrounded by a privacy fence and a row of tall, slender trees. The property is enclosed by a decorative fence with patterned panels and a gated entry. Large windows are distributed asymmetrically along the facade, providing ample natural light to the interior. The overall design emphasizes clean lines, open outdoor spaces, and a contemporary aesthetic.
description: A modern, single-story L-shaped bungalow with a flat roof, landscaped yard, and a private pool area, enclosed by decorative fencing and tall trees.
description_view_0: The front view highlights the main entrance, central tree, geometric pathway, and decorative fencing.
description_view_1: This side view emphasizes the L-shaped layout, the row of tall privacy trees, and the pool area.
description_view_2: The rear view shows the back facade, large windows, and the enclosed backyard with landscaping.
description_view_3: This angle showcases the pool, privacy fencing, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs in the yard.
